title: Loews Corporation to Release First Quarter 2022 Results on May 2, 2022
text: NEW YORK, April 19, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- Loews Corporation (NYSE: L) will report first quarter 2022 financial results on Monday, May 2, 2022. The conference call for investors will begin at 10:00 a.m.

title: Loews Corporation is a ‘hidden gem' in the rough, Jim Cramer says
text: "I think it's a hidden gem that should work perfectly in an increasingly tough market," the "Mad Money" host said Wednesday.
